title: Skeletons With Tipped Arrows
description: Skeletons have a chance of spawning with random tipped arrows.
body:
# Skeletons With Tipped Arrows
This datapack simply adds a 50% chance for each skeleton to spawn with a random tipped arrow.
For skeletons that do spawn with a tipped arrow, the probability for each type of tipped arrow is as follows:


<details>
<summary>1.21+</summary>

- poison: 17%
- slowness: 17% 
- harming: 17%
- weakness: 17%
- night_vision: 2%
- invisibility: 2%
- luck: 2%
- swiftness: 2%
- fire_resistance: 2%
- turtle_master: 2%
- water_breathing: 2%
- leaping: 2%
- regeneration: 2%
- strength: 3%
- slow_falling: 2%
- healing: 2%
- oozing: 2%
- wind_charged: 2%
- infested: 2%
- weaving: 2%

</details>



<details>
<summary>Pre 1.21</summary>

- poison: 16%
- slowness: 16% 
- harming: 16%
- weakness: 16%
- night_vision: 3%
- invisibility: 3%
- luck: 3%
- swiftness: 3%
- fire_resistance: 3%
- turtle_master: 3%
- water_breathing: 3%
- leaping: 3%
- regeneration: 3%
- strength: 3%
- slow_falling: 3%
- healing: 3%

</details>

You can manually change these probabilities inside the `Skeletons With Tipped Arrows.zip/data/skeletons_with_tipped_arrows/function/roll.mcfunction` file.

If you want to remove the datapack, run `/function skeletons_with_tipped_arrows:uninstall`. 

Credit to `mingshi3_uiuc` on Reddit for their [RNG implementation](https://www.reddit.com/r/MinecraftCommands/comments/vv68n6/tutorial_random_number_generator_by_scoreboard/).
